final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing editorial magazine cover for Xiaohongshu (小红书), announcing that GPT-image-2 is now available on the Lovart platform.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover
Composition: diagonal composition
Subject: magazine cover announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: high contrast with strong accent color
Color palette: high contrast with bold accent color
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: must feature the text "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" prominently
Avoid:
